account.ariaUnbound: Xiaomi Home account not bound, click to bind
account.unbindFail: Couldn't unbind, please try again later
account.confirmUnbindBodyPrefix: After unbinding, miloco disconnects from the current Xiaomi account
account.confirmUnbindBodySuffix: , and the home device list and family members will all be cleared.
account.payloadEmpty: Authorization code is empty, please copy it from the authorization page and paste
account.payloadNotBase64: Invalid authorization code format (not valid base64)
account.payloadParseFail: Couldn't parse authorization code, please make sure you copied it from the "Authorization succeeded" page
account.payloadMissingFields: Authorization code is missing the code or state field
account.payloadEmptyFields: Authorization code's code or state is empty
account.getOauthUrlFail: Couldn't get authorization link, please try again later
account.bindFail: Couldn't bind, please try again later
account.step1Title: ① Open the Xiaomi authorization page and log in to your Xiaomi Home account
account.step1Hint: Tap the button below to open Xiaomi authorization in a new tab, then come back here once done.
account.step2Title: ② Copy the authorization code from the "Authorization succeeded" page and paste it below
account.step2Hint: After authorizing, the page shows a string starting with letters and digits. Copy the whole thing here.
account.step3Hint: Choose the home for miloco to connect to. You can change it later in "Switch home".
account.noCamera: No camera recognized at home yet — first make sure the camera on Xiaomi Home is visible to miloco.
account.emptyMp4: Backend returned an empty mp4, possibly no key frame received
account.recordTimeout: Recording timed out — the camera may be offline or no key frame appeared, please try again later
account.previewReady: Have them stand in the frame, face visible, then tap start
account.recordingHint: Try to have them turn, look up, and glance at the lens
account.switchHomeOnlyOne: Only one home under the current account
